schema: OPH conditional exterior Standard-Model completion certificate v1

matter_package.chirality: M1* = Lambda^3 V + Lambda^1 V has no irreducible summand in common with M1
matter_package.global_descent: automatic once V is a genuine representation of S(U(3)xU(2))

anomalies.su2_witten_parity: PASS: SU(2) Witten parity is even, with four left-handed weak doublets modulo color multiplicity

weak_load.decomposition: (C tensor W) + (Lambda^3 C tensor W) = (C + complex line) tensor W

face_phase.yukawa_boundary: An exact unbroken A5 action on the family multiplicity space restricts Yukawa tensors to A5-invariant pairings. General family matrices require a source-derived breaking, hiding, or forgetting mechanism.

abstract_deck_control.premise: a declared free Z6 action on 24 slots

proved_mathematics: one-generation exterior decomposition and exact hypercharges
listed perturbative anomaly cancellation and the SU(2) Witten parity condition
four invariant orbits for any declared free Z6 action on 24 slots
remaining_producers: UD12 and RP-A5 from prior OPH primitives
AXIS-CENTER-DESCENT and the physical line spectrum
selection of the non-vacuum even exterior package
selection of H=W as the physical scalar doublet
A5 family-symmetry breaking, hiding, or forgetting before general Yukawa matrices
conditional_closure.no_extra_sector_boundary: M1 is the non-vacuum even exterior package, not the full even Clifford module. The full even exterior module also contains Lambda^0 V, and M1 alone is not Clifford-stable. Removing that singlet and excluding other anomaly-free light sectors requires MGFC/MAR or an observer-visible discriminator.
conditional_closure.physical_status: conditional structural theorem; no mass, coupling, pole, or unconditional screen-forcing claim
